Business rule Business Sort Key Later Than Ingestion Time

Card of business rule Business Sort Key Later Than Ingestion Time

Name

Business Sort Key Later Than Ingestion Time

Code

BUSINESS_SORT_KEY_LATER_THAN_INGESTION_TIME

Rule Type

Definition


Server expression of the business rule Business Sort Key Later Than Ingestion Time

Condition: If a record's business sort key is greater than DISP ingestion time __load_ts, the record is invalid.
Action: Log the record to the error entity and exclude it from downstream processing.


List of all dependencies of the business rule Business Sort Key Later Than Ingestion Time

Name

Code

Class Name
